entries.name: ChristoffelFromMetric
entries.summary: Christoffel symbols Gamma^a_bc of a canonical metric, as a CTensor {up,down,down}. Now cached via $MAuthorCache.

conventions.christoffel: Levi-Civita: Gamma^a_bc = 1/2 g^as (d_b g_sc + d_c g_sb - d_s g_bc)

entries.name: RiemannFromMetric
entries.summary: All-lower Riemann tensor R_{rho sigma mu nu} of a canonical metric, as a CTensor {down,down,down,down}.

conventions.riemann_mixed: R^r_smn = d_m Gamma^r_ns - d_n Gamma^r_ms + Gamma^r_ml Gamma^l_ns - Gamma^r_nl Gamma^l_ms

entries.name: CTRaise
entries.signature: CTRaise[t_?CTensQ, n_Integer] or CTRaise[t, n, g]
entries.summary: Raise index n of a CTensor using the metric. Dot-based contraction (Transpose + Dot + Transpose back).
entries.representation: input CTensor; output CTensor with index n flipped to up

benchmark.note: OGRe 0.020 ms is retrieval from its internal cache, not a fresh computation

entries.name: CTLower
entries.signature: CTLower[t_?CTensQ, n_Integer] or CTLower[t, n, g]
entries.summary: Lower index n of a CTensor. Same Dot-based engine as CTRaise.
entries.representation: input CTensor; output CTensor with index n flipped to down

entries.name: CTTrace
entries.summary: Contract (trace) indices i and j. One must be up, one down. Uses TensorContract.
entries.representation: input CTensor rank r; output CTensor rank r-2 (or scalar if r=2)

entries.name: CTProduct
entries.summary: Tensor (outer) product. Result rank = r1 + r2. Uses Outer[Times, ...].
entries.representation: input two CTensors; output CTensor rank r1+r2

entries.name: CTContract
entries.summary: Contract index i of t1 with index j of t2. Shorthand for CTTrace[CTProduct[...], ...].
entries.representation: input two CTensors; output CTensor rank r1+r2-2

entries.name: CTTransform
entries.summary: Coordinate transformation. rules = backward map (old coords as functions of new). Transforms components + stored metric via Jacobian contractions (Dot-based).
entries.representation: input CTensor + new coords + backward rules; output CTensor in new coords

benchmark.note: OGRe TAddCoordTransformation aborts in headless mode; verified against known EF metric instead

equivalence.method: EquivalentQ vs known analytic EF metric

entries.name: CovariantDFromMetric
entries.summary: Covariant derivative of any-rank tensor t w.r.t. Levi-Civita connection of metric g. Prepends one down index (derivative). Partial derivative + Gamma corrections via Dot-based contraction, uses cached Christoffels.
entries.representation: input CTensor rank r + metric; output CTensor rank r+1 with prepended down index

benchmark.note: OGRe comparison skipped (headless abort); verified nabla R = 0 for vacuum

entries.name: GeodesicEquationsFromMetric
entries.summary: Geodesic equations d^2 x^mu/dlambda^2 + Gamma^mu_{ab} dx^a/dl dx^b/dl = 0, returned as a list of expressions == 0. Coordinates promoted to functions of the affine parameter.
entries.representation: input metric; output list of d ODE expressions

cache.mechanism: $MAuthorCache (Association), shared between MAuthor` and MAuthorGR`. Keyed by Hash of inputs. CTCacheClear[] resets.
what_is_cached: Christoffel array (for Riemann, Ricci, covariant derivative, geodesics)

benchmark.problem: Schwarzschild full pipeline: Christoffel -> Riemann -> Ricci -> CovD
